MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Oren P. Noah, Esq., of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties Regina Vaughn, et al.

RULING:
BRAYTON PURCELL'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFFS REGINA VAUGHN, GEORGE VAUGHN & FELICIA VAUGHN

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Brayton Purcell's motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiffs is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)
